sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁרוּחן

Transliteration: shârûchen

Phonetic: shaw-roo-khen'

BDB Definition:

Sharuhen = "refuge of grace"
  1. a city in Judah allotted to Simeon

Origin: probably from H8281 (in the sense of dwelling [compare H8271] and H2580

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
